meta.title: DEF CON 33 - RF Village -  You might be a Wardriver if - MrBill, CoD_Segfault
meta.description:
A collection of images and quips that are related to the topic of being a wardriver. Images are SFW and culled from social media and other sources within the community. 
Presentation heavily relies on MrBill's rapier wit and CoD_Segfault's unmatched technical abilities to provide a narration of this curated collection
